current_state: Backend fortified with ajv strict schema validation and dynamic tenant routing.
Documentation UI finalized with tenant dropdowns, empty-state handling, and clear buttons.
Codebase export shell script institutionalized as export_context.sh.
Blueprint JSON schema migrated to comprehensively reflect the full 17-chapter structure.
Server updated with high-fidelity Markdown compiler utility.
next_objectives: Objective A: The 100% Fidelity Payload: I will parse the original Yield Force Blueprint-2.md file and generate the definitive, complete JSON payload for the Core Governor State.

Objective B: The Feedback Loop Validation: You will commit this JSON. We will test if our server.js compiler successfully recreates a Markdown file that perfectly matches your original design (including typography and images). If the UI rendering is off, we will surgically patch the compileBlueprintToMarkdown function.

Objective C: The "Domain Fluid" Injection: Once the core engine is stable, we will shift to the multi-tenant layer. We will map the ECU Medical documentation into the ecu_domain_dictionary.json schema and verify that tenant-specific logic isolates correctly in the UI.

reference_vault.purpose: Immutable RAG Knowledge Base for Build-Time Agents

chapters.title: The M-GRPO Revolution
chapters.content: The Yield Force engine is powered by Multi-Agent Group Relative Policy Optimization (M-GRPO). This ensures that every sub-agent in the operational squad remains aligned with the Sovereign's intent while maintaining extreme processing velocity.
key_breakthroughs: Hierarchical Credit Assignment: Precision reward distribution across agent squads.
Trajectory-Alignment Scheme: Preserving system stability during agent swaps.
Decoupled Pipelines: Independent evolution of governance and execution layers.

chapters.title: The 5-Zone Pipeline
chapters.content: Our infrastructure is partitioned into five distinct logical zones to ensure security, compliance, and deterministic outcomes.

zones.zone_3: The Agnostic Central Datastore (Source of Truth)

chapters.title: The Mathematical Anchor
chapters.content: Every action within the fortress is governed by the core reward function. This ensures that accuracy is the primary objective, while format compliance maintains the structural integrity of the machine-to-machine communication.

chapters.title: The Agnostic Base Reward vs. The Domain Fluid
chapters.content: The architecture is split between the immutable chassis and the injectable domain rules.
sections: The Engine Chassis: The Zone 1-5 pipeline and M-GRPO logic, which never changes.
The Domain Fluid: The specific rules (e.g., ECU Medical admissions vs. Red2Roast sales) injected at Build-Time.

chapters.title: Phase 0 (The Build-Time Flash Protocol)
chapters.content: Before the Operational Squad can begin hunting for Yield, the Onboarding Cohort runs a Phase 0 'Flash.' This process ingests the client's raw domain knowledge and outputs the structured JSON files (The 'Soul') that dictate the Operational Squad's behavior.

chapters.title: Multi-Tenant Sovereignty
chapters.content: A single Yield Force instance can run multiple clients simultaneously. Data bleed is physically prevented by strict tenant_id isolation in Zone 3 and partitioned metadata in Zone 5.

chapters.title: Zone 3 Data Architecture (The SQL Foundation)
chapters.content: Zone 3 is the immutable Source of Truth. The Universal Agnostic Schema is designed for Normalization-via-JSONB.
sections: 7.1 The Universal Agnostic Schema: A standard UID and Tenant ID structure.
7.2 The Outcomes Ledger: Stores final verified results.
7.3 The Intake Buffer: Where Zone 2 writes unverified data.
7.4 The Enthusiast Ledger: Logs granular data that builds brand advocacy.
7.5 Row Level Security (RLS): Enforces digital sovereignty at the database layer.

chapters.title: Zone 1 & 2 Engine Mechanics (The AI APIs)
chapters.content: Yield Force leverages Vertex AI and the Google GenAI SDK for hardened, enterprise-grade processing.
sections: Primary Model: Gemini 2.5 Flash for the stable, high-velocity data extraction.
Experimental Tier: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite for testing frontier capabilities in sandboxed environments.

chapters.title: The RAG Vault (Immutable References)
chapters.content: The reference_vault directory contains core architectural truth (like this Blueprint). It is used exclusively by Build-Time Agents to ensure their logic aligns with the Sovereign architecture.

chapters.title: The Onboarding Cohort (The Factory Deep-Dive)
chapters.content: Build-time agents responsible for 'Digital Excavation.' They translate human intent into the SOUL configuration package.
agents: The Architect: Designs the data schema and safety templates.
The Compliance-Guardian: Configures the audit triggers.
The Summarizer: Distills requirements into the System Prompt.

chapters.title: The Operational Squad (The Workforce Deep-Dive)
chapters.content: Persistent, execution-focused agents that live permanently within the 5-Zone Blueprint, synchronized to the M-GRPO reward function.
agents: Trend Hunter & Outreach Scout: Scans Geo-Fences for signals.
The Liaison: Handles lead nurturing and qualification.
The Sentinel: Enforces the 0.9/0.1 reward function on every action.
The Bridge (Native Closer): Writes the final verified transaction to the Datastore.

chapters.title: Safety Constraints & 'Hit-The-Brakes' Triggers
chapters.content: The system monitors for deviation from the M-GRPO target.
sections: Hard Triggers: Specific keywords or conditions that instantly halt an agent's workflow.
The HITL Handoff: Human-In-The-Loop protocol for flagged interactions.

chapters.title: The Zone 5 Strategic Governance Portal
chapters.content: The only window into the engine that truly matters for the executive, powered by a Direct Data Feed Bypass.
sections: Processed Intelligence View: High-level Yield snapshots, sentiment trends, and ROI metrics.
Raw Terminal View: Real-time, second-by-second 'Thought Stream' of the Liaison and Sentinel.

chapters.title: Prompt Handover Protocol
chapters.content: When shifting contexts or initiating new build cycles, the operator must export the entire codebase using export_context.sh. This ensures the Lead Architect (AI) has perfect state awareness.

chapters.title: Strategic Recalibration (The Sliders)
chapters.content: Modify the M-GRPO reward functions in real-time without writing code. You are mathematically re-weighting the Sentinel's audit criteria.
sliders: Aggression: Increases outreach frequency and conversion speed.
Clinical/Authority: Maximizes Accuracy and factual density.
Transparency: Increases the verbosity of the Raw Terminal View logs.

chapters.title: The 'Emergency Stop' and Rollback
chapters.content: If a newly injected Domain Fluid destabilizes the M-GRPO equilibrium, the operator can execute a complete rollback to the last verified JSON state archive.

chapters.title: Multi-Tenant Commercial Logic
chapters.content: Handles commercial extraction and billing logic independent of operational execution.
sections: 17.1 The Commercial Injection: Ingests billing_type during Phase 0.
17.2 The Metadata-Only Push: Asymmetric Sync to Agency Hub.
17.3 The Kicker Bridge: Triggers billing events upon 'Verified' ledger status.
